programs.title: The Real Housewives Of Durban
programs.desc: The ladies are back home and Maria catches Neil up on everything that took place on the trip. Ameigh plans her event, uncertain who will be attending while Slee wants to bury the hatchet with Maria.

programs.title: Lego Masters
programs.desc: In this Spooktacular episode, the six remaining teams will have 10 hours to embrace their dark side and complete their 'Spooky' builds.

programs.title: Cards And Collectables Australia
programs.desc: An epic Nintendo collection that would impress Mario himself, Vintage footy cards from over a century ago and how a master set collector turned his passion into a thriving business.

programs.title: Barbie: Dreamhouse Adventures
programs.desc: Trey injures himself on the Roberts' property, so the family nurses their demanding neighbour until Barbie realizes Trey may be up to something.

programs.title: Barney's World
programs.desc: Vivie's upset when her painting gets ruined so Barney takes the kids on a high-seas adventure to help Vivie learn healthy ways to manage big feelings. / Barney shows Mel the importance of respecting nature.

programs.title: LEGO DreamZzz
programs.desc: Mateo is saved by Z-Blob who has returned to unbox him from Dreamsmasher’s prison. The two dream chasers unbox the rest of their team and wreak havoc in the GLOWING ORB in order to try and retrieve Lunia’s hourglass and save the dream world from harm. But not everything is as it appears, as Mateo’s plan seems to go more smoothly than he had imagined.
